title: hieracium trichellum
intro: Hieracium trichellum, also known as hawkweed or false hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium trichellum are primarily attributed to its bitter compounds, including sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Hieracium trichellum include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Hieracium trichellum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
